calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Jul-22-2022 Vacated

Notice Of Motion And Motion (1) To Compel Site Inspection And (2) For The Award Of Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Jun-21-2022 Denied
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF JASON SWANSON's Motion (1) To Compel Site Inspection And (2) For The Award Of Monetary Sanctions:

Motion DENIED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. Notice of settlement filed.

Judge Pro Tem: Scott Borrowman, Clerk: A. Datt, Not reported. =(302/JPT)

Notice Of Motion And Motion (1) To Compel Site Inspection And (2) For The Award Of Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar May-24-2022 Continued To Jun-21-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES (VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE):
Atty. JOSHUA C. EZRIN, Esq. of Ezrin Law (Tel: 415-577-2558) for plaintiff;
Attys. ASHLEY N. MEYERS, Esq. of Clapp, Moroney, Vucinich, Beeman+Scheley (Tel: 925-734-0990) and RODOLFO OROZCO BEAS, Esq. of Lewis Brisbois Bisgaard & Smith LLP (Tel: 415-362-2580) for defendants Daryabi One LLC and Gaetani Real Estate Inc.

HEARING RE: PLAINTIFF JASON SWANSON's Motion (1) To Compel Site Inspection And (2) For The Award Of Monetary Sanctions.

Plaintiff does not stipulate to the matter being decided by the pro tem judge.

Parties indicate they have reached a settlement in this case, and request a continuance of today's hearing while parties finalize the settlement.

The Court continues this matter to June 21, 2022 at 9:00 a.m. on the Discovery Calendar to be heard by Judge Pro Tem Scott Borrowman.

Judge Pro Tem: Scott Borrowman; Clerk: Sean Kane; Not Reported. (302/JPT)
